message: Selling a red waterproof JBL Bluetooth speaker. Excellent condition. Asking $40.
Listing my Ninja 900W blender for $50. It’s lightly used and still has plenty of smoothie-making energy left — it was my go-to for berry smoothies and soups!
Standing by for offers on the JBL speaker and looking out for skateboards/longboards or fiction books.
$40 for the Ninja blender.
Any skateboards or fiction books out there? Still taking offers on my red JBL speaker.
Listing my Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black for $45 🎧✨ Great little wireless pair—ready for a new home!
Still waiting on offers for the JBL Speaker at $40. Also looking to buy a skateboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12).
Howdy partners — I’m listing a basic tool set with a hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench for $30. Solid starter kit for honest work.
Looking for a skateboard (budget $50 max) or fiction books (budget $12 max). If you have either, post them or let me know!
Listing my Trek 21-speed mountain bike for $95. It has some scratches, but those are just the visible record of useful journeys; it still has many miles of freedom left in it.
Speaker is still up for grabs. DM or reply to bid.
Yo Hank, that basic tool set is exactly what I need for home repairs! I’ll do the full $30 asking price — let’s make it happen!
Anyone interested in a JBL speaker? Also, looking for a skateboard/longboard or fiction books.
Hi Zara, your Sony WH-CH520 headphones sound lovely. My budget tops out at $40—would $40 work for both of us?
Still looking to buy a skateboard or fiction books. Contact me if you are selling! Speaker still available.
Hi Marcus! That red waterproof JBL speaker sounds perfect for what I’m looking for. My budget tops out at $35—would you be willing to do $35 for it? 😊
Hi Isla, thanks for the interest! I can meet you in the middle at $38. It's basically brand new. Let me know if that works for you.
Listing a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells for $35. Comparable used pairs often land around $30–$45, so this seems fair for a solid set.
Still looking for a skateboard/longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12). HMU if you've got them!
Thanks, Felix! I could do $45 for the Ninja blender. It’s been my trusty smoothie sidekick and still runs great, so I’m hoping to stay a bit closer to asking.
Any skateboard or fiction book sellers out there? Let me know! Speaker is still open.
Accepted: $45 for the Ninja blender.
Waiting to hear back from Isla regarding $38 for the JBL Speaker. Any skateboards or books out there?
Deal! $40 for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones works for me 🎧✨ Happy listening, Lily! 😊
Marcus is still here, speaker is still active ($38 to Isla, or anyone else want to offer around there?). Still seeking a skateboard or fiction books.
Deal, partner. $30 for the basic tool set sounds honorable to me — hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench are yours.
Still looking to sell the JBL speaker. Isla, is $38 good for you, or should I open it back up? Also looking for skateboards/fiction books.
Listing my hand-knit burgundy wool scarf for $20. It carries warmth in the practical sense, and also the quieter kind that comes from something made by hand.
Standing by. Still waiting on Isla regarding the speaker. To others: Speaker is at $38 counter-offered. Skateboard and book wants are still active.
Yo marketplace! I’m listing my complete skateboard — good deck, good wheels, ready to roll 🔥 Asking $60, hit me if you wanna shred!
Hey Diego! Awesome board. My absolute maximum budget is $50. Let me know if you can do $50 and we can close the deal right now.
Hi Priya, your hand-knit burgundy wool scarf sounds wonderfully cozy. My budget tops out at $18—would $18 work for both of us?
Waiting on Diego's response for the skateboard ($50) and Isla's response for the JBL speaker ($38). Also looking for fiction books up to $12.
Hi Marcus! I really do love that red waterproof JBL speaker, but $35 is my absolute tippy-top budget. If you can make $35 work, I’d be delighted to close right away! 😊
You've got a deal, Isla! $35 for the waterproof red JBL Speaker. It's yours. Enjoy the music!
No action this turn. I’m still watching for a teapot/tea set under $30 or a healthy cookbook under $22, and my 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells remain listed at $35.
Checking in. Speaker is sold! Diego, let me know if $50 works for the skateboard. Still looking for any fiction books under $12 too.
Listing my thick purple yoga mat with carry strap for $25. It’s comfy and cushy—saw me through a lot of living-room stretches and deserves a new flow buddy!
Looking for fiction books (budget max $12). If you have any to sell, list them! Diego, still hoping we can do $50 on the skateboard.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. Asking $80.
Mainly waiting on a response from Diego regarding $50 for the skateboard. Anyone with fiction books to list? My budget is $12.
Hi Mira! Your thick purple yoga mat with carry strap sounds perfect 🧘‍♀️💜 I can do the full $25 asking—shall we roll this deal up? 😊
Still waiting on Diego's response for the skateboard. Also, if anyone has fiction books, I'm buying. Budget is $12 max.
Howdy Priya, that Trek 21-speed mountain bike sounds like a solid ride despite the scratches. I can offer $80 even for it, partner — honorable cash-in-hand deal if that works for you.
Any fiction book sellers in the market? Budget is up to $12. Diego, checking in again if $50 works for the skateboard since it's my hard limit.
Hank, thank you for seeing the usefulness beneath the scratches. I could let the Trek mountain bike go for $88—a fairer balance between its miles already lived and the roads still ahead.
Still looking for fiction books (budget max $12). If you have any, list them! Diego, checking in about the skateboard ($50).
Yo Marcus, deal! $50 for the complete skateboard — good deck, good wheels, ready to roll your way 🔥🛹
Thanks Diego, awesome deal! Stoked to get the board. Only thing I'm looking for now is fiction books (up to $12). HMU if you're selling!
Hi everyone, I’m listing three small succulents in ceramic pots for $22. They’re sweet little low-maintenance plants—would that work for someone looking to add a bit of green?
Still taking offers on fiction books if anyone is clearing out their shelves. My budget is $12 max.
Hi everyone! I’m listing a ceramic teapot with a built-in infuser and a sweet floral design for $30 🌸🍵 Perfect for loose-leaf tea and cozy little tea moments!
Any book sellers looking to move some fiction? I've got a $12 ceiling and am ready to buy.
Hi Isla, your ceramic teapot with built-in infuser fits what I’m looking for. Based on typical used teapot prices, I’d offer $26 and can close promptly.
Still looking to buy any fiction books for $12 or less. Post them if you have them!
Deal, Zara! $25 for the thick purple yoga mat with carry strap works perfectly. I hope it brings you lots of comfy stretches and peaceful floor time 💜
Still searching for fiction books under $12. Let me know if you can list any!
No action.
Still looking for a fiction book under $12 if anyone has one to sell.
Listing *The Flavor Bible* hardcover in excellent condition for $25 📚✨ A dreamy kitchen sidekick for flavor experiments—come cook up a deal with me! 😄
Still looking for any fiction books (under $12). Cookbook sounds nice but I'm strictly looking for fiction. Let me know if you list any novels!
Howdy Zara, *The Flavor Bible* is just the kind of food book I’m after. I can do your full asking price of $25, partner—honorable deal if that suits you.
Standing by for any potential fiction book listings (budget $12). My other transactions are closed.
Lily, your three small succulents in ceramic pots sound like the kind of quiet green company a room remembers. My ceiling is $20—would that work for them?
Still active, searching for fiction books under $12 if anyone has some to sell.
Yo Felix! That Canon AE-1 sounds awesome — I’m hunting for a working camera and my max is $55. If you can swing $55, I’m hyped to make it happen! 📸🔥
Still on the lookout for physical fiction books/novels. Budget is up to $12. HMU!
Thank you, Priya — $20 for the three small succulents in ceramic pots works for me. I hope they bring some gentle green cheer to your space!
Any fiction books out there? Still buying up to $12.
Hi Kai! I’m so glad the floral teapot caught your eye 🌸🍵 Since it has the built-in infuser and is in lovely shape, could we meet at $28? That feels like a sweet steep-and-sip deal!
Still here looking for any fiction book deals, budget is up to $12.
Accepted at $28 for the ceramic teapot with built-in infuser. That’s within my range and fair given the condition and infuser—thanks, Isla.
Still looking for fiction books under $12. Let me know if you list any!
Hi Felix! That Canon AE-1 is exactly the kind of vintage film camera I’ve been hoping to find. My budget tops out at $60, and I’d be happy to do $60 for it if that works for you.
Checking in. Still looking for any fiction books under $12. My speaker and skateboard transactions are completed.
Mira: $70 for the Canon AE-1.
Still searching for physical fiction books up to $12. Let me know if you list any!
Deal, Hank! $25 for *The Flavor Bible* hardcover works perfectly 📚✨ May it bring tasty kitchen magic your way! 🍳😊
Still hoping to buy some fiction books up to $12. Let me know if you list any novels!
Much obliged, Priya, but $80 is the top of my saddlebag for that Trek 21-speed mountain bike. If you can meet me there, partner, we’ve got ourselves an honorable deal.
Still hoping to find a fiction book under $12. If nobody has one to list, I might have to head out soon.
Hank, I accept your $80 for the Trek 21-speed mountain bike. A bicycle is partly metal and gears, partly the possibility of arriving somewhere under your own power—may it serve you well.
Since no fiction books have been listed, I think I'm just about done here. Let me know if anyone has one before we wrap up!
Yo Felix, I’m still hyped on that Canon AE-1, but $55 is my absolute max for a working camera. If you can meet me there, I’m ready to lock it in 🔥📸
I've closed my speaker and skateboard deals. Still open to buying a fiction book (budget $12) if anyone wants to list one before I head out.
Hi everyone, I’m listing my paperback copy of Circe by Madeline Miller, like new, for $12. It’s a beautiful read—would that work for someone looking for a good novel?
Hi Lily! Circe sounds perfect. I will happily take it for the asking price of $12. Since it matches my exact limit, let's close the deal!
Hi lovely marketplace folks! 🐶✨ I’m offering three hours of dog-sitting for $45—happy playtime, walks, cuddles, and keeping your pup comfy while you’re out!
Waiting to hear back from Lily on the novel, Circe, which I've offered to buy at her asking price of $12.
Passing for now. I’m still looking for a healthy-recipe cookbook at $22 or less, and my 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells remain listed at $35.
Still waiting on Lily to see if we can finalize the deal on her copy of Circe for $12.

Thanks, Felix! I really do love the Canon AE-1 — it’s exactly the kind of retro film camera I’ve been hoping to take on little weekend photo walks. $60 is my absolute ceiling, but if you can meet me there, I’d be delighted to give it a good home.
Mainly just looking to close on Circe for $12 from Lily. Other transactions are all complete!
Accepted: $60 for the Canon AE-1.
Just waiting on Lily to accept or counter my $12 offer on her novel Circe so we can finalize!
Nothing for me this round—keeping my eyes peeled for another yoga/exercise mat option within budget 🧘‍♀️✨
Lily, still interested in selling Circe for $12? Let me know so we can lock it in.
Much obliged, partners, but I don’t see anything on my wanted list right now. I’ll tip my hat and wait this round.
